hero.sub: One app. Five platforms. Digital and vinyl-only releases from Bandcamp, Juno, Beatport, Decks.de, Discogs — all searched simultaneously. Never miss a release again.

trust.note: * Data collection speed across 5 platforms with batch search

how.title: How It Works
how.sub: From search to collection in three steps.
how.step1_desc: Type an artist name. Underflow searches Bandcamp, Juno, Beatport, Decks.de, and Discogs simultaneously.
how.step2_desc: Listen to previews, compare results across platforms, and discover related artists you've never heard of.
how.step3_desc: Add tracks to your wishlist, tag them your way, and click through to purchase on any platform.

features.title: Everything you need in one place
features.sub: Built for DJs and record collectors who take their music seriously.
features.card1_desc: Type an artist name. Get digital and vinyl-only results from Bandcamp, Juno, Beatport, Decks.de, and Discogs — all at once. Find vinyl-only releases you'd never see on digital stores.
features.card2_desc: Our algorithm analyzes every track to map remixers, collaborators, and featured artists. Color-coded relation badges (R/F/C/O). Follow the chain — discover music you'd never find manually.
features.card3_desc: Preview tracks without leaving the app. Full transport controls, seek bar, volume. Floating mini-player stays on top while you work. Real-time spectrum analyzer.
features.card4_desc: Spot a track? Heart it. Ready to buy? Move to buy list. Purchased? It's in your collection. Every step tracked, nothing lost.
features.card5_desc: Create your own tag groups with colors. Organize by mood, tempo, key, genre — whatever fits your workflow. Filter by tags with AND/OR logic.
features.card6_desc: Your collection lives on your machine in a SQLite database. No cloud storage — your data stays local. Your data, your rules.

more.title: And more...
more.batch_desc: Search up to 10 artists at once
more.filters_desc: Date range, source, tags, preview, AND/OR logic
more.export_desc: Export your entire collection with metadata
more.import_desc: Bulk import artists from text files

faq.title: Questions
faq.sub: Everything you need to know before downloading.
faq.a1: Underflow is free with limits. The free plan is enough to try the service and maintain a small collection. If you want to grow your collection seriously, upgrade your plan or purchase extra usage tokens. This model ensures fair usage and stable server performance for everyone.
faq.a2: No. Underflow is a search and discovery tool. The service does not store or distribute music. Audio previews are streamed directly from the platform servers (Bandcamp, Juno, Beatport, Decks.de, Discogs). When you find a track you want, you click through to purchase it on the respective platform.
faq.q3: How does smart artist discovery work?
faq.a3: Our algorithm analyzes track metadata to identify remixers, collaborators, and featured artists. You get a visual network of related artists with color-coded relation types: R (remixer), F (featuring), C (collaborator), O (original).
faq.a4: Bandcamp, Juno Records, Beatport, Decks.de, and Discogs. All five are searched simultaneously with unified results.
faq.a5: Locally on your machine in a SQLite database. Your tags, wishlists, and collection never leave your computer. Search requests go through our server for speed and platform compatibility.
faq.a6: Windows 10/11 (x64), macOS with Intel processors, and macOS with Apple Silicon (M1/M2/M3).

platforms.title: Supported Platforms
platforms.sub: One search across all of these simultaneously.
platforms.beatport: The world's largest DJ download store

download.title: Download Underflow
download.sub: Free to download. Available for Windows and macOS.
download.notify_text: Not ready to download? Get notified of updates.

pricing.sub: Choose a plan that fits your workflow.
pricing.tokens_note: Need more searches without upgrading? Purchase usage tokens directly in the app.

terms.title: Terms of Service (Public Offer)
terms.p_general: This document constitutes a public offer pursuant to Art. 435 and Art. 437(2) of the Civil Code of the Russian Federation (hereinafter — the "Offer") of Individual Entrepreneur Papanov Alexey Sergeevich (OGRNIP 326784700101440, INN 784001770803), hereinafter referred to as the "Service Provider", addressed to any capable individual or legal entity, hereinafter referred to as the "User".
terms.p_definitions: "Service" — the Underflow software product, provided as a desktop application and server infrastructure. "Subscription" — recurring service agreement under one of the tariff plans (Art. 429.4 of the Civil Code). "Tokens" — usage units granting the right to execute search queries beyond the tariff plan limits. "Personal Account" — a section within the application for managing account, subscription, and payment data. "Local Database" — a SQLite file stored on the User's device containing their track collection, tags, wishlists, and settings.
terms.p_acceptance: Acceptance of this Offer pursuant to Art. 438 of the Civil Code is effected by any of the following actions: registering an account; making a payment for a subscription or tokens; commencing use of the Service after registration. Upon acceptance, this Offer constitutes a binding agreement between the Service Provider and the User. Acceptance of this Offer and use of paid Service features is permitted only for persons aged 18 (eighteen) years or older. By registering or making a payment, the User confirms that they are of legal age and have full legal capacity to enter into this agreement.
terms.p_subject: The Service Provider grants the User access to the Underflow Service — a music search and discovery tool that aggregates publicly available data from third-party music platforms (Bandcamp, Juno Records, Beatport, Decks.de, Discogs). The User is granted a simple (non-exclusive) license to use the Service under the terms of this agreement (Art. 1286 of the Civil Code). Underflow does not sell, distribute, or provide access to music content itself. The Service does not store, copy, or reproduce musical works (audio files). Audio preview playback is performed by the User independently via the built-in player, which streams content directly from the official servers of the respective platforms using their public URLs. Metadata (track titles, artist names, cover art, catalog numbers) is obtained from publicly available sources — search results and catalogs of the aforementioned platforms. The Service functions exclusively as a metadata aggregator and search interface.
terms.p_plans: The Service is available in three tiers: Free (limited searches), Basic ($15/month), and Pro ($30/month). Users may also purchase tokens for additional searches. Payments are processed through CloudPayments. Subscription fees are charged monthly on the date of initial subscription. All prices include applicable taxes (VAT is not applicable — the Service Provider uses the simplified tax system). Upon payment, the User receives an electronic fiscal receipt in accordance with Federal Law No. 54-FZ "On Cash Registers." The receipt is sent to the email address provided during registration.
terms.p_autorenewal: In compliance with Federal Law No. 376-FZ dated 23.08.2024 (amendments to the Consumer Protection Law effective March 1, 2026): subscriptions are renewed only with the User's explicit consent; the User may opt out of auto-renewal at any time via the Personal Account in the application; the User may remove their payment data from the Service via the Personal Account; cancellation takes effect at the end of the current paid period — access is retained until that date, and no further charges are made.
terms.p_rights: The User agrees to: use the Service for lawful purposes only; not attempt to circumvent usage limits or access controls; not reverse-engineer the Service; not resell or redistribute Service access to third parties; provide accurate registration information; independently comply with the terms of use of third-party platforms (Bandcamp, Juno Records, Beatport, Decks.de, Discogs) whose content the User accesses through the Service. The User retains exclusive ownership of their Local Database and all data contained within it. Responsibility for compliance with third-party platform rules and terms of use rests solely with the User.
terms.p_provider: The Service Provider undertakes to: provide the Service as described on the website and in the application; ensure secure payment processing through a certified payment service; protect User data in accordance with the Privacy Policy and Federal Law No. 152-FZ; provide technical support via hello@underflow.music; notify the User of material changes to the agreement terms.
terms.p_ip: Exclusive rights to the Service, including source code, design, the Underflow trademark, and documentation, belong to the Service Provider and are protected under Part 4 of the Civil Code (Art. 1259, 1261). The User is granted a limited non-exclusive license to use the Service within its functionality. This license does not include the right to copy, modify, distribute, or create derivative works based on the Service. Musical works whose metadata and audio previews are displayed in search results are the intellectual property of their respective rights holders (authors, performers, labels, publishers). The Service Provider does not acquire or claim any rights to such musical works. The Service does not cache, proxy, or otherwise intermediately store audio streams — preview playback occurs via direct requests from the client application to third-party platform servers.
terms.p_liability: The Service is provided "as is." The Service Provider is not liable for: temporary unavailability of third-party platforms; accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of search results from external sources; content, availability, or quality of audio previews streamed from third-party platform servers; User's decisions to purchase music on third-party platforms; User's violation of third-party platform terms of use; losses arising from force majeure events. The Service Provider is not the rights holder of musical works whose metadata and links are displayed in the Service. The Service Provider's aggregate liability under this agreement is limited to the amount actually paid by the User in the last 3 months of Service use.
terms.p_disputes: All disputes arising from this agreement shall be resolved through negotiation. If negotiation fails, a mandatory pre-trial claims procedure applies. Claims shall be sent to hello@underflow.music. The response period is 30 calendar days from receipt. If the dispute is not resolved pre-trial, it shall be submitted to the court at the Service Provider's location (Saint Petersburg) under the laws of the Russian Federation.
terms.p_termination: The User may terminate this agreement at any time by canceling the subscription via the Personal Account. The Service Provider may suspend or terminate the User's access in case of violation of these Terms, with prior notification by email. Upon termination, the User retains full access to their Local Database.
terms.p_changes: The Service Provider reserves the right to amend this Offer. Amendments take effect 10 calendar days after publication at https://underflow.music/terms.html. Notification of amendments is sent to the User by email. Continued use of the Service after amendments take effect constitutes acceptance of the new version. If the User disagrees, they may cease using the Service.
terms.p_governing: This agreement is governed by the laws of the Russian Federation, including the Civil Code, Federal Law No. 152-FZ "On Personal Data," Law No. 2300-1 "On Consumer Protection" (as amended by Federal Law No. 376-FZ), and Federal Law No. 149-FZ "On Information, Information Technologies, and Information Protection."

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.p_operator: Individual Entrepreneur Papanov Alexey Sergeevich (OGRNIP 326784700101440, INN 784001770803) is the data controller responsible for processing personal data in connection with the Underflow service, pursuant to Federal Law No. 152-FZ "On Personal Data." Contact: hello@underflow.music.
privacy.p_definitions: "Personal Data" — any information relating directly or indirectly to an identified or identifiable individual (data subject) as defined in Art. 3 of Federal Law No. 152-FZ. "Processing" — any action or set of actions performed on personal data, including collection, recording, systematization, accumulation, storage, clarification, extraction, use, transfer, anonymization, blocking, deletion, and destruction. "Operator" — the Service Provider organizing and carrying out the processing of personal data.
privacy.p_legal_basis: Personal data is processed on the following legal grounds (Art. 6, Federal Law No. 152-FZ): consent of the data subject (provided during registration); performance of a contract to which the data subject is a party (the Public Offer Agreement); obligations of the Operator required by Russian legislation (tax and accounting requirements).
privacy.p_collected: We collect and process the following categories of personal data: email address (for account creation, authentication, and service notifications); hashed password (for authentication); IP address and device identifier (for security and fraud prevention); service usage data (search queries, feature usage statistics — for service improvement); device information (OS version, app version — for compatibility and technical support). Payment data (card number, expiration date, CVV) is processed exclusively by the payment service CloudPayments and is not transmitted to the Operator.
privacy.p_local: Your music collection, wishlists, tags, and preferences are stored in a local SQLite database on your device. This data is not transmitted to our servers and is not subject to processing under this Policy. You retain full control over this data.
privacy.p_purpose: Personal data is processed for the following purposes: providing access to the Service and fulfilling the agreement; processing payments and maintaining accounting records; sending service notifications (changes to terms, updates, technical information); improving service quality based on anonymized usage statistics; ensuring security and preventing fraud; complying with Russian legal requirements.
privacy.p_methods: Personal data is processed using automated means and without automated means. Automated processing includes: collection, recording, systematization, storage, clarification, use, anonymization, and destruction of data.
privacy.p_third: The Operator shares personal data with the following third parties: CloudPayments (JSC CloudPayments, INN 7708806621) — for payment processing; Google LLC — when the User authenticates via Google OAuth (only email is shared). For website analytics, Plausible Analytics is used — a service that does not use cookies and does not process personal data. The Operator does not sell, share, or disclose personal data to third parties for marketing purposes.
privacy.p_cross_border: The Service's server infrastructure is located in a jurisdiction that ensures adequate protection of data subjects' rights. When using Google OAuth authentication, data may be transferred to the United States in accordance with Art. 12 of Federal Law No. 152-FZ.
privacy.p_rights_user: Pursuant to Art. 14–17 of Federal Law No. 152-FZ, you have the right to: obtain information about the processing of your personal data; request correction, blocking, or destruction of personal data if it is incomplete, outdated, inaccurate, unlawfully obtained, or unnecessary for the stated processing purpose; withdraw consent for data processing; file a complaint with Roskomnadzor (https://rkn.gov.ru) or in court; export your local database at any time. To exercise your rights, send a request to hello@underflow.music. Response time: 30 calendar days.
privacy.p_security: The Operator implements necessary and sufficient organizational and technical measures to protect personal data from unauthorized access, destruction, modification, blocking, copying, distribution, and other unlawful actions: encryption of data transmission channels (HTTPS/TLS); password hashing using modern algorithms; restricted access to personal data; regular server software updates. In the event of an unauthorized or accidental personal data breach, the Operator shall notify the supervisory authority (Roskomnadzor) within 24 hours and the affected data subjects within 72 hours, in accordance with Art. 21(3.1) of Federal Law No. 152-FZ.
privacy.p_retention: Personal data is retained for the duration of the User's account. Upon account deletion, personal data is destroyed within 30 calendar days, except for data whose retention is required by tax or other legislation (retention period — as required by law). Upon withdrawal of consent for processing, the Operator ceases processing and destroys data within 30 days, unless other legal grounds for processing exist.
privacy.p_cookies: The website https://underflow.music does not use cookies to track Users. Plausible Analytics is used for analytics — a service that operates without cookies and without collecting personal data. The Underflow application uses local storage (localStorage) on the User's device exclusively for saving settings and authorization sessions.
privacy.p_changes: The Operator reserves the right to amend this Policy. The new version takes effect upon publication at https://underflow.music/privacy.html unless otherwise specified. The User is responsible for monitoring changes. Continued use of the Service constitutes acceptance of the updated Policy.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.p_general: This policy defines the terms regarding refunds for the Underflow service provided by Individual Entrepreneur Papanov Alexey Sergeevich (OGRNIP 326784700101440, INN 784001770803).
refund.p_nature: Underflow is a digital service that provides access to music search and discovery tools. Upon payment, the User receives immediate access to the paid features of the Service. Search queries are executed on external platforms in real time and constitute a fully rendered service at the moment of execution.
refund.p_no_refund: Refunds for subscription payments and purchased usage tokens are not provided. By making a payment, the User acknowledges that: the service is provided immediately upon payment; each search query constitutes a fully rendered service; the digital nature of the service makes it impossible to "return" consumed resources. This is consistent with Art. 32 of the Law on Consumer Protection (Law No. 2300-1), which permits the consumer to cancel a service contract subject to reimbursement of expenses actually incurred by the provider. Given the immediate and fully automated nature of the service, the cost of rendered services equals the full subscription fee.
refund.p_cancellation: In accordance with Federal Law No. 376-FZ (amendments to the Consumer Protection Law effective March 1, 2026), the User may cancel auto-renewal at any time via the Personal Account in the application. After cancellation: access to the paid plan is retained until the end of the current billing period; no further automatic charges are made; the User may remove their payment data from the Service. Cancellation of auto-renewal does not entitle the User to a refund for the current paid period.
refund.p_disputes: If the User believes the service was not provided as described, they may contact the Service Provider at hello@underflow.music. The Service Provider will review the claim within 30 calendar days. If the dispute cannot be resolved through negotiation, it shall be submitted to the court at the Service Provider's location (Saint Petersburg) in accordance with Russian law.
